title: ux-TimePicker
text: ux-TimePicker This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-TimePicker properties. ux-DateTimePicker Widget Note: ux-TimePicker follow the time format (12-hour/24-hour) configured in the user's system locale. Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-TimePicker Maps to physical widget: uxTextField of type time Default definition: ux-TimePicker=uxTextField(html:type=time) Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Fields of Uniface data types Date, Time, and DateTime.
